relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The hour becomes prayer for mutual glory of Father and Son.
Authority over embodied humanity becomes gift of age-long life.
Age-long life is knowing the true Divine and the sent Messiah.
The work is completed on earth as glory to the Father.
The Son asks to share again the glory before the world.
The name has been revealed to those given from the world.
They know the gifts come from the Father.
Words received become knowing and trust in the Sending.
The prayer turns specifically toward those given.
Mutual belonging becomes glory in them.
Holy Father, keep them in the name so they may be one as we are.
He guarded them in the name; loss is held inside Scripture’s fulfillment.
He speaks in the world so his joy may be fulfilled in them.
Given the word, they no longer belong to the world-order.
The prayer is not removal from the world, but protection within it.
They are not from the world as he is not from the world.
Truth sanctifies; the Father’s word is truth.
As the Son is sent, so the disciples are sent.
His self-sanctifying opens their sanctification in truth.
The prayer widens to all who will trust through their word.
Oneness is mutual indwelling for the world’s trust.
Given glory becomes shared oneness.
I in them, You in me: completed into one so love is known.
He wills that the given ones behold his glory and pre-world love.
The world does not know, but the Son knows and the disciples know he is sent.
The name is made known so the Father’s love may be in them and the Son in them.
